title: Bump to 1.8-dev
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Bump to 1.8-dev.  I was hoping to fetch #1357, but it's taking forever to get through CI, going to start this one along and hope I don't get a merge mess.
